reviews.comment:
Baños limpios. Ricos sandwiches de mila y atención hiper amable! Lo unico es que solo aceptan efectivo en el Servicompras.

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms. Delicious milanesa sandwiches and super friendly service! The only downside is that they only accept cash at the convenience store.

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios y muy linda atención.  Despues de estar viajando 600km paramos por un café con leche y estuvo muy bueno 👌 la atención de los playeros excelente 👌

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms and very friendly service. After traveling 600km, we stopped for a coffee with milk and it was very good 👌 The service from the attendants was excellent 👌
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeHFtalhBEAE

lugar lindo y tranquilo, excelente atenciòn, lamentablemente no hay platos de comidacalientes  porque la encargada esta de vacaciones.

reviews.comment:
Que desastre comer ahi.. pedí un sandw de mila, y la mila era un papel ( literal ), q obvio se la devolvimos. El ACA debería poner algo mejor ahí, mas lindo...

(Translated by Google)
What a disaster eating there... I ordered a milanesa sandwich, and the milanesa was literally just a piece of paper, which we obviously sent back. ACA should put something better there, something nicer...
